plugins.name: documentation-guide
plugins.description: Operating manual + 11 CLI wrappers for the documentation-template framework. Triages docs/issue/blog/config tasks to domain-specific references (writing, docs-layout, blog-layout, issue-layout, settings-layout). Wrappers: docs-list/show/subtasks/agent-logs/set-state/add-comment/add-agent-log/review-queue plus docs-check-blog/config/section validators.
